title: RED CROSS DISASTER SERVICES - 211info
text: NORTHWEST OREGON CHAPTER RED CROSS DISASTER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides disaster services focused on meeting people's immediate needs resulting from disasters, such as shelter, food, health, and mental health services. 3131 N Vancouver Avenue Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm, 24 hours per day / 7 days per week during an emergency Email (503) 284-1234 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 284-1234 Main phone (888) 680-1455 Hotline Disaster Relief and Recovery Main phone (503) 284-1234 Hotline (888) 680-1455 Disaster Response Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Clatsop, Columbia, Gilliam, Hood River, Lincoln, Marion, Multnomah, Polk, Sherman, Tillamook, Wasco, Washington, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Disaster Related Clothing/Emergency Supplies Disaster Related Shelter Services Disaster Relief/Recovery Organizations General Disaster Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - DNA/RELATIONSHIP TESTING SERVICES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH AND SAFETY COURSES MILITARY SERVICE - RED CROSS MILITARY SERVICES PUBLIC SAFETY - SOUND THE ALARM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTHWEST OREGON CHAPTER
